target_fund_identity.format_clue: A combination of a report header (p.5), a column in the statement of financial position (p.14), and a row in a descriptive table in the notes (p.22).
target_fund_identity.evidence_quote:
p5: Investment Manager’s report For the financial period ended 31 July 2025 Trojan Fund (Ireland)
p14: Trojan Fund (Ireland) Note GBP
p22: Trojan Fund (Ireland) The sub-fund aims to achieve growth in capital, ahead of inflation (UK Retail Prices Index), over the longer term (5 to 7 years). 13 February 2012

fund_size_history.format_clue: Columnar tables in the Statement of Financial Position and Statement of Changes in Net Assets, showing 'Net assets attributable to holders of redeemable participating shares' for multiple dates.
fund_size_history.evidence_quote:
p14: Net assets attributable to holders of redeemable participating shares 562,965,276
p15: Net assets attributable to holders of redeemable participating shares 563,639,155
p19: Net assets attributable to holders of redeemable participating shares at the end of the financial period 546,423,915

share_classes_catalog.format_clue: A table of share transactions showing opening, issued, redeemed, and closing number of shares for each class (p.32, 34). A separate table lists the Net Asset Value per share for each class (p.40).
share_classes_catalog.evidence_quote:
p32: Trojan Fund (Ireland) Class I EUR accumulation 51,321,618.74 11,260,497.75 (7,747,734.89) 54,834,381.60
p40: Trojan Fund (Ireland) Net asset value per share Currency 31 July 2025 31 January 2025 Class I EUR accumulation EUR 1.2091 1.2238

fee_structure.format_clue: Narrative text and tables in Note 6 describing the Annual Management Charge per share class. Note 7 describes the Depositary fee. Appendix 1 (p.67) provides a table of Total Expense Ratios (TER).
fee_structure.evidence_quote:
p29: Trojan Fund (Ireland) ... All Class I shares 1.50% ... All Class O shares 1.00% ... All Class X shares 0.85%
p67: Total Expense Ratio Trojan Fund (Ireland) Class I EUR accumulation 1.61%

fund_economics_yearly.format_clue: Columnar table in the 'Statement of comprehensive income' showing income and expense lines for the 6-month period. Key lines are 'Annual management charge', 'Total operating expenses', and 'Increase/(decrease) in net assets...'.
fund_economics_yearly.evidence_quote: p16: Statement of comprehensive income (unaudited) For the financial period ended 31 July 2025. Trojan Fund (Ireland) GBP. Annual management charge 2,736,281. Total operating expenses 2,958,539. Increase/(decrease) in net assets... (4,983,011)

currency_conversion_rates.format_clue: A table in Note 9 titled 'Exchange rates' listing spot foreign exchange rates used to convert assets and liabilities to the functional currency (GBP and USD) at the reporting dates.
currency_conversion_rates.evidence_quote: 9. Exchange rates. The following spot foreign exchange rates were used to convert the assets and liabilities held in foreign currencies... 31 July 2025 Currency Exchange rate to GBP. Australian dollar 2.054896. Euro 1.156283

asset_allocation_history.format_clue: The 'Schedule of investments' provides a detailed list of holdings grouped by asset type (Equities, Debt securities, etc.) with a percentage of NAV for each holding and aggregated totals for each asset type.
asset_allocation_history.evidence_quote: p48: Trojan Fund (Ireland) ... % of NAV. Total equities (2025: 30.88%) 219,141,918 38.93% ... p49: Total debt securities (2025: 67.85%) 342,138,324 60.77%

geographic_allocation_history.format_clue: The 'Schedule of investments' groups individual holdings by country, with subtotals showing the total percentage of NAV for each country.
geographic_allocation_history.evidence_quote: p48: Trojan Fund (Ireland) ... Equities. Canada ... 5,126,139 0.91%. France ... 17,414,068 3.10%. Ireland ... 6,537,171 1.16%.

portfolio_metrics.format_clue: Benchmark is stated in the manager's report (p.5) and fund objective note (p.22). A drawdown figure is mentioned on p.5. A qualitative comment on duration is on p.6. The schedule of investments (p.48-49) provides the data to calculate concentration and number of positions.
portfolio_metrics.evidence_quote:
p5: For comparative purposes, the UK Retail Price Index (the “Index”) returned +3.3%... The Sub-Fund fell -2.7%, peak-to-trough
p6: During the reporting period, we reduced the Sub-Fund’s weighted average duration to these bonds from five years to two years

top_holdings.format_clue: A full 'Schedule of investments' table listing all holdings with their name, currency, nominal amount, fair value, and percentage of NAV. Holdings are grouped by asset type and country.
top_holdings.evidence_quote: p48: Schedule of investments As at 31 July 2025. Trojan Fund (Ireland). Equities. Canada. Canadian National Railway Co USD 72,586 5,126,139 0.91%

performance_history.format_clue: A narrative paragraph at the beginning of the Investment Manager's report for the sub-fund, stating the return for the period for a specific share class and its benchmark.
performance_history.evidence_quote: The Trojan Fund (Ireland) (the “Sub-Fund”) Class O GBP accumulation shares returned +0.5% in the financial period. For comparative purposes, the UK Retail Price Index (the “Index”) returned +3.3% and the Bank of England Base Rate returned +2.2% over the same period.

manager_qualitative.format_clue: A combination of the fund's official investment objective in the notes (p.22) and narrative paragraphs in the 'Outlook' section of the Investment Manager's report (p.5-6) describing the strategy and positioning.
manager_qualitative.evidence_quote: p6: Against this backdrop, we remain conservatively positioned, with a relatively low weighting to equities and significant exposure to more defensive assets in the form of gold, short-dated inflation-linked bonds, and liquidity... to fulfil our dual mandate of preserving our investors’ capital and growing it in real terms over the long term.

manager_thesis_and_decisions.format_clue: Narrative paragraphs in the 'Market Review', 'Portfolio Review', and 'Outlook' sections of the Investment Manager's report for the sub-fund.
manager_thesis_and_decisions.evidence_quote:
p5: Within the equity component of the portfolio, we added to existing holdings in Agilent Technologies, Alphabet, Chubb and Diageo and established new holdings in Adobe, L’Oréal, Hubbell, Canadian National Railway, LSEG and LVMH.
p6: We exited Procter & Gamble (P&G) and Moody’s...
